data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. ZIPPING TANAKA made light work of the tricky draw with a fast early sectional but gathered in and had to settle for the minors, finishing third (17.76) at this track over 300m. Can measure up this time. 6. EARN YOUR KEEP had a tough draw to overcome and was game in defeat when only one length from Zipping Nuttall in second (17.63) at this track. Form from his last run is proving to be solid. Can measure up. 2. FLAKY PIE has been ordinary in two runs to date. One of the better hopes. 8. PEGASUS OPAL makes debut for the Jason Carter kennel. Start all important and will need some luck getting across from the wide draw. Profiles well so pay to keep very safe.","runners":[1,6,2,8],"exclusive":false}
